item.annihilationbladeex.desc.line1: §8"§dWhen the stars fall silent, this blade still hums in the void.§8"
item.annihilationbladeex.desc.line2: §8"§5It does not cut flesh; it erases existence's permission to remain.§8"
item.annihilationbladeex.desc.line3: §8"§dSevered space, wounded worlds, and the last refrain of the end.§8"
item.annihilationbladeex.desc.line4: §8"§6The wielder needs no victory; the conclusion kneels first.§8"
item.annihilationbladeex.annihilation_co: §dRight-click to awaken the blade of terminus
item.annihilationbladeex.annihilation_fr: §7Nine starfall remnants converge into the §5Annihilation Core
